Professional Summary

Highly experienced AutoCAD and Civil 3D operator with 12+ years of expertise in site development, civil engineering projects, and 3D visualization. Proven ability to produce accurate construction drawings, drainage systems, and realistic 3D models for highways, flood control systems, and infrastructure projects. Proficient in V-Ray, Lumion, SketchUp, and surveying software.
